query:
SELECT 
  vcl.variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  vcl.customerId,
  c.companyName as customer_name
FROM variant_customer_links vcl
JOIN product_variants pv ON vcl.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON vcl.customerId = c.id
WHERE pv.variantCode LIKE 'DC-001-GRY%'
ORDER BY vcl.variantId
